Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Keep HoneyBook Meet and Greets and the Medicaid Google Form intake visible on one board.
  • Track prenatal meetings, EDD windows, and on-call timing without reconstructing it from texts.
  • Keep postpartum recovery notes and belly-binding sessions attached to the same family record.
